_meta.description: Orthodox lectionary readings for the Daily Office and Divine Liturgy. Two indexed cycles: 'movable' is keyed by paschal-day offset (pdist), 'fixed' is keyed by canonical Menaion month-day (MM-DD). The composer applies a precedence rule (Great-Feast movable overrides Menaion; otherwise both layer).
_meta.license: Reading references (book + chapter + verse) are scriptural pointers — not copyrightable. Verse text comes from Theosis's own Bible content.
_meta.coverage: Movable cycle: principal named days (Pascha through All Saints). Fixed cycle: major feasts within May. Weekday cycles outside named days are deferred to a later slice.
